prediction.reasoning: BRK-B is historically a low-volatility stock with annual volatility around 20-25%. For a 2-day prediction, I used a random walk model with daily volatility of ~1.3% (annualized ~20%). The point estimate assumes no drift due to the short timeframe. Confidence intervals reflect the natural uncertainty in stock movements, with wider intervals for higher confidence levels.
